narrative:
Warren City 4D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 861 registered voters, with 72.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.6 percentage points.
